headline: Maximise Impact, Minimise Admin
description: Free your team from administrative burden so they can focus on what matters — your mission. AI employees handle donor management, reporting, and communications.

pain_points.point: Limited budgets stretch small teams thin
Impact measurement is difficult to maintain

solutions.title: Donor Relationship Management
solutions.description: Layla manages personalised donor communications, thank-you sequences, and engagement campaigns automatically.

solutions.title: Grant & Impact Reporting
solutions.description: Safiyyah compiles grant reports, tracks KPIs, and generates impact summaries — saving hours of admin each week.

solutions.title: Ethical AI at Reduced Rates
solutions.description: We offer preferential pricing for registered charities because ethical AI should be accessible to those doing the most good.
